layout.spacing: Generous (2x standard). Use p-6, p-8, gap-6.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.metric: p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-card to-card/50

tables.header: h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0

logs.container: bg-[#050505] border border-border rounded-lg p-4 font-mono text-xs overflow-y-auto max-h-[500px] text-green-400/90 shadow-inner

visual_enhancers.gradients: None generally. Subtle radial gradient top-center for depth: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.05), transparent 40%)

elements: Main 'Ejecutar Migración' (Execute Migration) Button - Large, Prominent
Data Table of synced tables (odoo.res_partner, etc.)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. LANGUAGE: The entire UI MUST be in SPANISH (Español). Labels, Buttons, Messages, Tooltips.
2. THEME: Enforce DARK MODE. Set class='dark' on the html/body tag by default.
3. CLEANUP: Delete or clear /app/frontend/src/App.css to remove default centering styles. Use Tailwind classes for layout.
4. COMPONENTS: Use existing shadcn components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui. Do not reinvent the button or card.
6. ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' (default) or '@heroicons/react' for UI icons (Database, Play, RotateCcw, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle).
7. NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on migration start/success/fail.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all buttons have aria-labels and high contrast.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, rows).
10. LAYOUT: Do not center the entire app. Use a top-nav + container layout.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
